summary: Mission v13.6 - Design 'Zéro Cadre' VALIDATED. Anti-regression confirmed: 22 reservations, 7 contacts. Sessions/offers sections now have transparent backgrounds with no visible violet borders. Réserver button works (scrolls to sessions). Video area shows placeholder when heroImageUrl fails (expected behavior).

issues: Video area shows clapper-board placeholder when heroImageUrl (YouTube URL) fails to load - Expected fallback behavior, not a bug

✅ Course-card has inline styles: background: 'transparent', border: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' (lines 3822-3828)
✅ CSS .course-card class updated: background: #000000, box-shadow: none, border: none (App.css lines 291-310)
✅ CSS .offer-card class updated: background: #000000, box-shadow: none, border: none (App.css lines 352-383)
✅ DashboardHeader.js component created but NOT integrated into CoachDashboard yet
✅ CoachDashboard.js still at 4794 lines (unchanged from v13.5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v13.6 validated. Design 'Zéro Cadre' applied to sessions and offers sections - transparent backgrounds, no visible violet borders/glow on main containers. DashboardHeader.js component created (230 lines) but NOT integrated into CoachDashboard.js yet. CoachDashboard.js remains at 4794 lines. Anti-regression: 22 reservations, 7 contacts confirmed. Video area shows placeholder when heroImageUrl fails - this is expected behavior. Réserver button scrolls from 0 to 357.
